nasb.text: In those days the Lord began to send Rezin king of Aram and Pekah the son of Remaliah against Judah.

esv.text: In those days the Lord began to send Rezin the king of Syria and Pekah the son of Remaliah against Judah.

cnv.text: 在那些日子，耶和華開始派遣亞蘭王利汛和利瑪利的兒子比加去攻擊猶大。

ccb.text: 那时，耶和华差遣亚兰王利汛和利玛利的儿子比加攻打犹大。
